rationale: No conflict. Elec. Code §274.027 governs state payment rates for publishing constitutional amendment notices. The proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase is unrelated statutory policy.
quote: The amount paid by the state for publication of notice of a proposed constitutional amendment under this subchapter is as follows:
_note: Rule concerns publication payment for constitutional amendments; proposed change is a statutory homestead exemption adjustment with no overlap.
